---
title: "SeqArray_k25_D5"
author: "KirstenCarlson"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

This RMarkdown records commands used to evaluate discoSnp_Rad VCF for errors, using workflow outlined in https://marineomics.github.io/RADseq.html#Evaluate_potential_sources_of_error.

For testing, I will be using only one vcf (k = 25, D = 5).

## Install packages

```{r}
install.packages("BiocManager")
BiocManager::install("SeqArray")
BiocManager::install("SNPRelate")
install.packages("ggplot2")
```
## Load Packages

```{r}
library(SeqArray)
library(dplyr)
library(SNPRelate)
library(ggplot2)
```


## Convert VCF file to GDS format

Set variables (directory, filename, parameter analysing):

```{r}
scratch.directory = "/scratch/kcarls36/projects/data/alignments/sint_align/discosnp/k25_D5/"
results.directory = "/home/kcarls36/projects/stephanocoenia_FKNMS/results/discosnp/k25_D5/"
parameters = "k25_D5"
resources.directory = "/home/kcarls36/projects/stephanocoenia_FKNMS/resources/"
metafile = paste0(resources.directory, "stephanocoeniaMetaData.csv")
filename = "discoRad_k_25_D_5_slim"
filename.gds = paste0(scratch.directory, filename, ".gds")
filename.vcf = paste0(scratch.directory, filename, ".vcf.gz")
```

Then run SeqArray on the slimmed vcf. (I requested 32G and 4:00:00 for R hpc session. Process took about 1hr15min)
```{r}
SeqArray::seqVCF2GDS(vcf.fn = filename.vcf, out.fn = filename.gds, storage.option="ZIP_RA")
```

Read in file:
```{r}
gdsin = SeqArray::seqOpen(filename.gds)
```


Cross check # samples:
```{r}
print(paste0("The number of SAMPLES in data: ", length(c(SeqArray::seqGetData(gdsin, "sample.id")))))
print(paste0("The number of variants in data: ", length(c(SeqArray::seqGetData(gdsin, "variant.id")))))
```

Upload metadata file
```{r}
sample.ids = seqGetData(gdsin, "sample.id")
metadata = read.csv(metafile)
sample.strata = metadata %>%
                    select(sample,site,depthZone)
```

## Missingness 

```{r}
print("Per variant: ")
summary(m1 <- SeqArray::seqMissing(gdsin, per.variant=TRUE))
print("Per sample: ")
summary(m2 <- SeqArray::seqMissing(gdsin, per.variant=FALSE))
samples <- SeqArray::seqGetData(gdsin, "sample.id")
cbind(samples,m2)[order(-m2),]
# plot histogram
png(filename= paste0(results.directory, parameters, "_missingness_hist.png"), width = 800, height = 600, units = "px")
hist(m2,breaks=50)
dev.off()
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.align="center}
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(results.directory, parameters, "_missingness_hist.png"))
```

## PCA

Exclude samples that have too much missing data

```{r}
# exclude samples with over 50% missing data
bad_samples = c("SKF120", "SFK085", "SFK134", "SFK188", "SFK178", "SFK198", "SFK106", "SKF127", "SFK208", "SFK214", "SFK213")

sample.ids = seqGetData(gdsin, "sample.id")
keep = sample.ids[which(!sample.ids %in% bad_samples)]
```

Filter out linked sites if needed:
(This took 45 min with one thread)
```{r}
snpset <- SNPRelate::snpgdsLDpruning(gdsin, ld.threshold=0.2, autosome.only=F, start.pos="random", num.thread=1, remove.monosnp=T, sample.id=keep)
snpset.id <- unlist(unname(snpset))
```

Run PCA
```{r}
# PCA only on SNPs with a minor allele frequency > 5%
pca.out = SNPRelate::snpgdsPCA(autosome.only=F, gdsin, num.thread=2, remove.monosnp=T, maf=0.05, snp.id=snpset.id, sample.id=keep)
```

## Plot PCA

Ensure correct sampleID ordering
```{r}
#PC1 v PC2 colored by depth Zone
id.order = sapply(keep, function(x,df){which(df$sample == x)}, df=sample.strata) #in case your strata file is not in the same order as your vcf
sample.strata.order = sample.strata[id.order,]
```

PCA of axis 1 and 2, colored by depth zone
```{r}
png(filename= paste0(results.directory, parameters, "_pcaInitial_V1_V2.png"), width = 800, height = 500, units = "px")
print(
  as.data.frame(pca.out$eigenvect) %>%
      tibble::add_column(., depthZone =  sample.strata.order$depthZone, site = sample.strata.order$site) %>%
      ggplot(., aes(x=V1, y=V2, shape = depthZone, color = site)) + 
      geom_point(size = 5, alpha = 0.5) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0) +
      theme_bw() +
      xlab(paste0("PC1 [",paste0(round(pca.out$varprop[1]*100, 2)), "%]")) +
      ylab(paste0("PC2 [",paste0(round(pca.out$varprop[2]*100, 2)), "%]")) +
      ggtitle("Initial PCA Colored by Site and Shape by Depth Zone")
)
dev.off()

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(results.directory, parameters, "_pcaInitial_V1_V2.png"))
```

View replicates from PCA with sample labels. Do they cluster together?
```{r}
replicates <- c("SFK066.1", "SFK066.2", "SFK066.3", "SFK162.1", "SFK162.2", "SFK162.3", "SFK205.1", "SFK205.2", "SFK205.3")

png(filename= paste0(results.directory, parameters, "_pcaInitial_replicates_V1_V2.png"), width = 800, height = 500, units = "px")
as.data.frame(pca.out$eigenvect) %>%
      tibble::add_column(
        sample = pca.out$sample.id, 
        depthZone =  sample.strata.order$depthZone, 
        site = sample.strata.order$site) %>%
      dplyr::filter(sample %in% replicates) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x=V1, y=V2, label = sample)) + 
      geom_text(size = 3) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0) +
      theme_bw() +
      xlab(paste0("PC1 [",paste0(round(pca.out$varprop[1]*100, 2)), "%]")) +
      ylab(paste0("PC2 [",paste0(round(pca.out$varprop[2]*100, 2)), "%]")) +
      ggtitle("Initial PCA: Replicates")
dev.off()

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(results.directory, parameters, "_pcaInitial_replicates_V1_V2.png"))
```

Remove replicates and rerun PCA
```{r}
keep_noreps <- keep[!keep %in% replicates]

pca.out.noreps = SNPRelate::snpgdsPCA(autosome.only=F, gdsin, num.thread = 1, remove.monosnp = T, maf = 0.05, snp.id=snpset.id, sample.id=keep_noreps)
```
```{r}
#PC1 v PC2 colored by depth Zone
id.order.noreps = sapply(keep_noreps, function(x,df){which(df$sample == x)}, df=sample.strata) #in case your strata file is not in the same order as your vcf
sample.strata.order.noreps = sample.strata[id.order.noreps,]
```


```{r}
png(filename= paste0(results.directory, parameters, "_pcaInitial_noreps_V1_V2.png"), width = 800, height = 500, units = "px")
print(
  as.data.frame(pca.out.noreps$eigenvect) %>%
      tibble::add_column(., depthZone =  sample.strata.order.noreps$depthZone, site = sample.strata.order.noreps$site) %>%
      ggplot(., aes(x=V1, y=V2, shape = depthZone, color = site)) + 
      geom_point(size = 5, alpha = 0.5) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0) +
      theme_bw() +
      xlab(paste0("PC1 [",paste0(round(pca.out$varprop[1]*100, 2)), "%]")) +
      ylab(paste0("PC2 [",paste0(round(pca.out$varprop[2]*100, 2)), "%]")) +
      ggtitle("PCA (no replicates) Colored by Site and Shape by Depth Zone")
)
dev.off()

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(results.directory, parameters, "_pcaInitial_noreps_V1_V2.png"))
```

```{r}
png(filename= paste0(results.directory, parameters, "_pcaInitial_noreps_V2_V3.png"), width = 800, height = 500, units = "px")
print(
  as.data.frame(pca.out.noreps$eigenvect) %>%
      tibble::add_column(., depthZone =  sample.strata.order.noreps$depthZone, site = sample.strata.order.noreps$site) %>%
      ggplot(., aes(x=V2, y=V3, shape = depthZone, color = site)) + 
      geom_point(size = 5, alpha = 0.5) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0) +
      theme_bw() +
      xlab(paste0("PC2 [",paste0(round(pca.out$varprop[1]*100, 2)), "%]")) +
      ylab(paste0("PC3 [",paste0(round(pca.out$varprop[2]*100, 2)), "%]")) +
      ggtitle("PCA (no replicates) Colored by Site and Shape by Depth Zone")
)
dev.off()

knitr::include_graphics(paste0(results.directory, parameters, "_pcaInitial_noreps_V2_V3.png"))
```
